mapper.select: SELECT pc.id, pc.project_id, pc.task_id, pc.content, pc.author_id, pc.parent_id, pc.create_time, u.real_name AS author_name FROM project_comment pc LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = pc.author_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE pc.project_id = #{projectId} AND pc.deleted = 0 ORDER BY pc.create_time ASC

SELECT pc.id, pc.project_id, pc.task_id, pc.content, pc.author_id, pc.parent_id, pc.create_time, u.real_name AS author_name FROM project_comment pc LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = pc.author_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE pc.task_id = #{taskId} AND pc.deleted = 0 ORDER BY pc.create_time ASC
